With industry-leading, NIST-standardized post-quantum cryptography support (ML-KEM, ML-DSA), plus traditional ECC and RSA cryptographic algorithms, as well as fault-tolerance and side-channel countermeasures, PQPlatform-TrustSys is an ultra-secure solution for systems – before, during, and beyond the transition to PQC.

PQCryptoLib-SDK is PQShield's plug-and-play software development kit, designed for applications already in the field, providing better performance than the built-in PQC library in OpenSSL, and helping to transition OpenSSL-based applications to quantum resilience.

interaction_phrase: an integration of PQShield's FIPS 140-3 CAVP/CMVP ready PQCryptoLib-Core library, with OpenSSL
occurrence_sentence: PQCryptoLib-SDK consists of an integration of PQShield's FIPS 140-3 CAVP/CMVP ready PQCryptoLib-Core library, with OpenSSL. It provides certificate management, TLS connection, and an easy-to-use API that helps you develop quantum-resistant software, without code modifications.
